formdata.description: Must be a valid email address, not empty, and up to 200 characters.

Must be a valid password, not empty, between 8 and 50 characters, contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one digit, one special character (@$!%*?&+), and must not contain whitespace.
Must be a valid name, not empty, between 3 and 50 characters, and contain only letters and spaces.
Must be a valid name, not empty, between 3 and 50 characters, and contain only letters and spaces.
Must be a valid Egyptian national ID, not empty, exactly 14 digits, start with 2 or 3, and contain a valid birth date.
Must be a valid Egyptian phone number and not empty.
Must be a valid language value (en or ar).
Must be a valid street name, not empty, between 3 and 200 characters.
Must be a valid apartment number or identifier, not empty, and up to 20 characters.
Must be a valid floor value, not empty, and up to 10 characters.
Must be a valid building name or number, not empty, and up to 50 characters.
Optional field for additional details, up to 400 characters.
Not Empty.
